items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】M60531 Monogram 👏👏 This envelope wallet is crafted from elegant Monogram canvas, featuring a clever and unique interior design with various pockets and card slots. Size 19x10cm

items.name_en: 【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
This passport cover is part of the Flight Mode collection, celebrating the spirit of travel. Made from monogram canvas, it features vintage hotel labels selected from the extensive collection gathered by Louis Vuitton's grandson Gaston-Louis in the early 20th century. The leather-lined lid also includes four card slots.
Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
This passport cover is part of the Flight Mode collection, celebrating the spirit of travel. Made from monogram canvas, it features vintage hotel labels selected from the extensive collection gathered by Louis Vuitton's grandson Gaston-Louis in the early 20th century. The leather-lined lid also includes four card slots.
Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

items.name_cn:
【cléa 】 m82383 ( )
Made of monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "portefeuil lisa". A compact wallet with a coin pocket featuring a leather pull tab and a card slot. The size is also attractive for small bags and clutches. Inside features a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
【cléa 】 m82383 ( )

Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm

items.name_cn:
M14163 ( - )
The small Victorine wallet is elevated with a vibrant multicolor Monogram pattern from the re-edition of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, refreshing the house's iconic signature with the Japanese artist's rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas with a refined calfskin lining and silver hardware. A zip pocket holds coins, while the interior has multiple compartments for bills and cards.
Size: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
M13399 ( - )
The Rosalie coin wallet is an elegant everyday essential, designed compactly with a circular front flap secured with a gold snap button. Part of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series re-edition, it is made of Monogram coated canvas inspired by the artist's iconic style. Inside features a zip coin pocket with a coordinating colorful lettering pull tab.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5cm

items.name_cn:
M13399 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
The Rosalie coin purse is an elegant daily essential, featuring a compact design with a round front flap secured by a gold snap. As part of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue, it is crafted from Monogram coated canvas inspired by the artist's iconic style. It includes a zip coin pocket on the inside with coordinating colorful lettering pulls.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
As part of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue, the timeless Zippy coin purse is practical and playful, elevated for this season. Made from Monogram coated canvas with joyful rainbow tones that match the artist's signature pop palette. It features a silver zip closure and is divided into multiple compartments for coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm

items.name_en: M13664 Black Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
M13664 Black Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This key pouch from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue is crafted from coated canvas. The vibrant signature print twists the House's iconic Monogram pattern with the Japanese artist's rainbow palette. It is secured with a silver zip and includes a chain with a hook to keep keys safe.
Size: 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm
